article_items.title: Chinese cybercrime operation that used AI to scam 'hundreds of thousands of victims' sued by Google | TechCrunch
article_items.description: The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.
